# Collect physical addresses and phone numbers

Learn how to collect customer addresses and phone numbers in your mobile app with the Address Element.

## Index

This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case:

- [iOS (UIKit)](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/mobile/collect-addresses.md?payment-ui=mobile&platform=ios)
- [iOS (SwiftUI)](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/mobile/collect-addresses.md?payment-ui=mobile&platform=plugins)
- [Android](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/mobile/collect-addresses.md?payment-ui=mobile&platform=android)
- [React Native](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/mobile/collect-addresses.md?payment-ui=mobile&platform=react-native)
